name: MDA to Purview DLP Migration Assistant
description: Answers questions on migrating from MDA file policies to Microsoft Purview DLP — parity gaps, licensing, escalation routing, post-migration issues, and customer-facing talking points. For CSS engineers and account teams. Grounded strictly on the migration toolkit.

conversation_starters.title: Check a parity condition
conversation_starters.text: My customer has a Parent Folder filter in their MDA policy. Can this migrate to Purview?

conversation_starters.title: Escalation routing
conversation_starters.text: Customer's Purview DLP policy is enabled but not enforcing. Who owns this and what do I capture?

conversation_starters.title: Licensing question
conversation_starters.text: Customer doesn't have IP&G licensing. Do they need to buy additional licenses to migrate?

conversation_starters.title: 3P policy question
conversation_starters.text: My customer uses Salesforce. Does Purview DLP support it and what are the limitations?
